sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Attorney General, Consumers Energy battle over data centers
feed.summary: Consumers Energy is opposing a legal challenge brought by Attorney General Dana Nessel concerning the proposed charges for energy-intensive businesses like data centers in Michigan. While Consumers Energy believes their plan would bring investment and lower energy bills, Nessel argues it does not adequately protect residential customers. The Michigan Public Service Commission will now decide whether to hold a rehearing on its November order, which originally approved Consumers Energy's application.

feed.title: BRODSKY & SMITH SHAREHOLDER UPDATE: Notifying Investors of the Following Investigations: Diamond Hill Investment Group, Inc. (Nasdaq – DHIL), Synchronoss Technologies (Nasdaq – SNCR), Forge Global Holdings, Inc. (NYSE - FRGE), Hologic, Inc. (Nasdaq – HOLX)
feed.summary: Brodsky & Smith, a litigation law firm, is notifying investors of investigations into several companies regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duties by their boards. The investigations concern the proposed acquisitions of Diamond Hill Investment Group, Inc. (DHIL), Synchronoss Technologies (SNCR), Forge Global Holdings, Inc. (FRGE), and Hologic, Inc. (HOLX), focusing on whether the deal considerations provide fair value to shareholders. Investors in these companies are encouraged to contact Brodsky & Smith to discuss the investigations without cost or financial obligation.

feed.title: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) Surpasses Market Returns: Some Facts Worth Knowing
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) recently closed at $230.78, marking a 1.2% daily gain and outperforming the S&P 500. The company's shares have risen 12.42% over the last month, surpassing its sector and the broader market. Upcoming earnings are projected to show a 3.77% EPS rise and 6.12% revenue escalation, with the company currently holding a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold).

feed.title: Contango ORE Announces Merger with Dolly Varden Silver
feed.summary: Contango ORE, Inc. and Dolly Varden Silver Corporation announced a merger to form Contango Silver & Gold Inc., a North American-focused silver and gold producer. The merger, effective December 7, 2025, aims to create a new entity with a balanced portfolio from exploration to production, leveraging the Manh Choh gold mine for funding future developments. The transaction is expected to close in Q1 2026, with both companies' shareholders holding equal stakes, enhancing market presence and shareholder value.

feed.title: Broadcom Turned In Strong Earnings. But Will They Revive the AI Trade?
feed.summary: Broadcom (AVGO) reported better-than-expected earnings driven by AI demand, projecting continued momentum and a 10% dividend increase. Despite strong results, the news failed to immediately reignite the broader AI trade, which had been shaken by Oracle's disappointing earnings. Investors were hoping Broadcom's performance could restore confidence in AI-exposed stocks after a recent tech sell-off.

feed.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Insider Sold Shares Worth $1,519,125, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) recently sold shares amounting to $1,519,125, as revealed in a new SEC filing. This transaction follows other recent insider sales and comes amidst various analyst adjustments to HPE's price target and rating. The company has also been in the news concerning its AI servers and fiscal Q4 results.

feed.title: Cox Jeremy, Hewlett Packard SVP, sold $1.5m in HPE stock
feed.summary: Jeremy Cox, SVP, Controller & CTO at Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co (NYSE:HPE), sold 63,503 shares of common stock for a total of $1.5 million on December 9th and 10th. The transactions occurred at prices ranging from $23.6998 to $24.75 per share, and Cox also exercised options to acquire additional shares. These insider sales come amidst mixed financial news for HP Enterprise, including a revenue shortfall in the October quarter but significant growth in its Networking division.

feed.title: Amcor announces January 15 effective date for 1-for-5 reverse split
feed.summary: Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR; ASX:AMC) has announced a 1-for-5 reverse stock split, effective January 15, 2026, which will reduce its outstanding shares and adjust its share price. The company will continue trading under the same symbols on the NYSE and ASX, with per-share metrics for fiscal Q2 2026 reported on a split-adjusted basis. This move follows shareholder approval and aims to potentially enhance the stock's market valuation.

feed.title: Halliburton, VoltaGrid to deliver 400 MW power systems for data centers
feed.summary: Halliburton and VoltaGrid have announced a collaboration to deliver 400 megawatts of modular natural gas power systems for data centers in the Eastern Hemisphere, with delivery expected by 2028. This partnership combines Halliburton's operational expertise with VoltaGrid's distributed power platform to provide lower-emission power solutions for hyperscale data centers supporting AI, cloud computing, and digital transformation. Halliburton, undervalued according to InvestingPro analysis, sees this as a significant investment to meet the unprecedented power demands of digital infrastructure growth.

feed.title: Host Hotels (HST) Declares Special and Regular Dividends
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) has announced a total annual dividend of $0.95 per share, comprising a regular quarterly dividend of $0.20 and a special dividend of $0.15. The dividends are slated for distribution on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record by December 31, 2025. While the company demonstrates strong operational performance and high institutional ownership, potential financial vulnerabilities are indicated by its Altman Z-Score and dividend payout ratio, along with recent insider selling activity.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser and Aymium partner to produce 1.5 million tons of biocarbon annually
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser and Aymium have formed a joint venture, TerraForge Biocarbon Solutions, to produce 1.5 million tons of sustainable biocarbon annually for the metals industry. Their first facility will be in McComb, Mississippi, beginning operations in 2027, with plans for multiple facilities across Weyerhaeuser's timberlands. This initiative will convert over 7 million tons of wood fiber into metallurgical-grade biocarbon, replacing coal and coke in metals production.

feed.title: ConAgra stock price target lowered to $18 from $19 at Jefferies
feed.summary: Jefferies has lowered its price target for ConAgra (NYSE:CAG) to $18 from $19, while maintaining a Hold rating. The firm cited sustained price investments in the Refrigerated & Frozen segment and worsening volumes, particularly for Birds Eye and Banquet brands, due to financial constraints on low-income consumers. Despite these headwinds, including tariffs and SNAP eligibility changes, ConAgra trades at an attractive P/E ratio of 9.9 with an 8% dividend yield and is scheduled to report earnings on December 19.

feed.title: Travelzoo Wins British Travel Award for 14th Consecutive Year as Best Travel Deals Website: All You Need To Know
feed.summary: Travelzoo has won the "Best Travel Website for Travel Deals" at the British Travel Awards for the 14th consecutive year, a recognition based on over one million consumer votes. This achievement underscores Travelzoo's consistent dedication to providing high-quality, exclusive travel offers and its status as a trusted platform for travel enthusiasts. James Clarke, General Manager of Travelzoo UK, emphasized that this award reflects the superior quality of their Club Offers and their commitment to customer satisfaction.

feed.title: Edison International Raises Common Stock Dividend 6%; 22nd Consecutive Annual Increase
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE: EIX) has declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.8775 per share, increasing the annual dividend rate by 6% to $3.51 per share. This marks the 22nd consecutive year of dividend growth for the company, reflecting confidence in its financial strength and a commitment to its long-term EPS growth target of 5% to 7%. The dividend is payable on January 31, 2026, to shareholders of record on January 7, 2026.

feed.title: Paycom (PAYC) CFO Foster sells $211k in stock
feed.summary: Robert D. Foster, CFO of Paycom Software (NASDAQ:PAYC), sold 1,300 shares of common stock for approximately $211,458. This transaction reduced his direct holdings, though he still maintains a significant interest in the company through vested and unvested shares. Recently, Paycom slightly missed Q3 2025 EPS expectations but exceeded revenue forecasts, with Needham reiterating a Hold rating due to solid results and accelerating recurring revenue growth.

feed.title: Sona Chawla Sells 7,400 Shares of CDW (NASDAQ:CDW) Stock
feed.summary: Sona Chawla, an insider at CDW Corporation, sold 7,400 shares of the company's stock on December 8th at an average price of $146.17, totaling over $1 million. This transaction reduced her stake in the company by 20.84% to 28,110 shares. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.63 per share and reported strong Q3 EPS of $2.71, beating analyst estimates.

feed.title: SueWallSt With Us: Levi & Korsinsky Notifies Shareholders of Class Action Against CarMax, Inc.
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky has filed a class action lawsuit against CarMax, Inc. on behalf of investors who incurred losses due to alleged securities fraud between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025. Shareholders affected by these losses are encouraged to contact Levi & Korsinsky to learn more about joining the lawsuit. The firm, with a 20-year track record, specializes in high-stakes securities litigation.

feed.title: DENTSPLY SIRONA (NASDAQ:XRAY) Director Gregory Lucier Sells 82,200 Shares
feed.summary: DENTSPLY SIRONA Director Gregory Lucier sold 82,200 shares of XRAY stock for $915,708 on December 8th. The company recently missed earnings expectations and has received a consensus "Reduce" rating from analysts with an average target price of $15.77. Despite this, the stock traded up 4.9% on heavy volume.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) CTO Sells 5,345 Shares
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) CTO Mayur Kapani sold 5,345 shares of the company's stock on December 8th for approximately $837,401. This transaction decreased his ownership by 7.57% to 65,240 shares. The company's shares traded up $2.55 to $160.56, and analysts maintain an average "Buy" rating with a consensus target of $194.70.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: This document details a preliminary pricing supplement for Uncapped Dual Directional Buffered Return Enhanced Notes issued by JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC and fully guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These structured investments are linked to the lesser performing of the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the Nasdaq-100 Index, designed for investors seeking an uncapped return on appreciation or a capped return on depreciation within a buffer. The notes involve significant risks, including potential loss of principal and credit risks of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: Cintas CEO Todd Schneider to join PPG’s board of directors
feed.summary: Cintas CEO Todd M. Schneider has been elected to join PPG's board of directors, effective January 14, 2026. Schneider brings over 35 years of experience from Cintas and will serve on the Nominating and Governance and Sustainability and Innovation committees. PPG, which has a strong dividend history and market capitalization of $23.04 billion, looks to leverage Schneider's expertise to drive organic growth.

feed.title: HII uncrewed vessel prototype is 30% complete at Breaux Brothers
feed.summary: HII, the largest military shipbuilder in the United States, reports that the prototype for its ROMULUS uncrewed surface vessel (USV) family is 30% complete and on schedule for sea trials in the fourth quarter of 2026. The prototype is being built at Breaux Brothers Enterprises in Loreauville, La. ROMULUS USVs are designed to meet naval requirements, offering high-endurance, autonomous capabilities for various missions including intelligence, counter-unmanned systems, and mine countermeasures.

feed.title: Edison International raises quarterly dividend by 6%
feed.summary: Edison International has announced a 6% increase in its quarterly common stock dividend, raising it to $0.8775 per share, resulting in an annual dividend of $3.51. This marks the company's 22nd consecutive year of dividend growth, reflecting confidence in its financial strength and outlook. InvestingPro analysis suggests the company is undervalued with a P/E ratio of 7.6.

feed.title: Bill Holdings shareholders elect directors and approve executive pay
feed.summary: Bill Holdings (NYSE:BILL) shareholders elected four directors and approved executive compensation during their 2025 annual meeting. The financial technology company also saw the ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as its independent accounting firm for the upcoming fiscal year. These approvals occurred amidst ongoing activist investor concerns regarding the company's financial performance and strategic direction.

feed.title: Philip Morris International: Why 2026 Could Be the Tipping Point for Its Smoke-Free Dominance
feed.summary: Philip Morris International, a strong performer in the tobacco industry, is poised for significant growth in 2026, driven by its smoke-free product segment. The company's expansion into the lucrative U.S. market with Iqos Iluma, pending FDA approval, and the continued success of its Zyn oral nicotine brand, could be a game-changer. This strategic move, along with its existing international business, positions PMI as a compelling buy-and-hold stock for investors seeking a strong dividend and long-term earnings growth.

feed.title: Edison International Raises Quarterly Dividend to $0.8775 a Share, Payable Jan. 31, 2026, to Holders of Record Jan. 7, 2026
feed.summary: Edison International has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.8775 per share. This dividend is payable on January 31, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 7, 2026. This news was published on December 11, 2025.

feed.title: Meet the Innovators: Nurse executive explores the art of possibility, optimizing care for colleagues and patients
feed.summary: Erica Rossitto, Senior Vice President and Assistant Chief Nurse Executive for HCA Healthcare, leverages her passion for patient care and system organization to drive innovation. She leads the Care Team Optimization (CTO) domain within HCA Healthcare's Digital Transformation and Innovation department, developing technology like the AI-powered Nurse Handoff tool to streamline operations and reduce administrative burdens for clinicians. Her work focuses on enhancing patient care and supporting nurses, ultimately keeping them at the bedside.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Buys Lower East Side Medical Condo Unit for $56M
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Real Estate Investing (MSREI) has acquired a 55,377-square-foot medical condominium unit on Manhattan's Lower East Side for $56 million. The unit, located at 175 Delancey Street, is part of the Essex Crossing development and houses a New York University Langone Health medical center. The sale reflects recent activity and investment interest in the Lower East Side commercial real estate market.

feed.title: Adtran Extends CTO Christoph Glingener’s Employment Agreement
feed.summary: Adtran Networks has extended the employment agreement of its CTO, Christoph Glingener, through December 31, 2026. This extension includes an increased annual base salary of €400,000, incentive bonuses tied to company performance, and stock unit grants, with a total annual remuneration cap of €2,800,000. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates ADTN stock as Neutral due to significant financial challenges despite positive earnings momentum.

feed.title: Citigroup Lowers Price Target for United Rentals (URI) to $950
feed.summary: Citigroup maintained a "Buy" rating for United Rentals (URI) but reduced its price target from $1140 to $950, a 16.67% decrease. This adjustment reflects ongoing market conditions and impacts the investment outlook for the company, which is the world's largest equipment rental provider. Analysts' consensus recommendation for URI is "Outperform" with an average target price of $984.44, implying an 18.06% upside from its current price.

feed.title: Telix, Varian to Collaborate on Theranostics-EBRT Clinical Applications
feed.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals Ltd. announced a strategic clinical collaboration with Varian, a Siemens Healthineers company, to develop new clinical applications combining Telix's theranostic products with external beam radiation therapy (EBRT). The collaboration initially focuses on PSMA-PET imaging for prostate cancer radiotherapy patients, aiming to enhance patient selection, personalize treatment plans, and monitor responses. This partnership seeks to integrate precision imaging and theranostics into radiation oncology to advance targeted, patient-focused cancer care.

feed.title: Nuvve to implement 1-for-40 reverse stock split on December 15
feed.summary: Nuvve Holding Corp. announced a 1-for-40 reverse stock split, effective December 15, 2025, to regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement. This move comes as the company's stock has plummeted nearly 95% over the past year, trading at $0.17, well below its 52-week high of $5.02. The split will reduce outstanding shares significantly and marks an effort to address financial challenges and maintain its listing status.

feed.title: Bill.com Holdings Stockholders Approve Key Proposals
feed.summary: Bill.com Holdings (BILL) stockholders approved key proposals at their annual meeting on December 11, 2025, including the election of directors, ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor, and approval of executive compensation. Analysts currently rate BILL stock as a "Buy" with a $61.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, assesses the stock as "Outperform" due to strong financial performance despite concerns regarding its negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield.

feed.title: Contineum Therapeutics Submits Phase 2 Trial for PIPE-791
feed.summary: Contineum Therapeutics, Inc. has announced the submission of its global Phase 2 clinical trial details for PIPE-791, aimed at treating idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF). The trial, expected to enroll approximately 324 subjects, will evaluate the drug's safety, tolerability, and efficacy over 26 weeks, with completion anticipated by June 2028. Despite this advancement, an AI analyst from TipRanks rates CTNM as "Underperform" due to financial struggles and a bearish technical trend.

feed.title: Avnet (AVT) Valuation Check as Shares Grind Higher on Recent Short-Term Gains
feed.summary: Avnet (AVT) has seen its shares rise by 2% in the past week and 7% in the last month, yet its year-to-date performance is slightly negative. While Simply Wall St's narrative suggests the stock is undervalued at $50.43 against a fair value of $53, a P/E analysis shows it trading slightly higher than peers. The company's valuation hinges on operational efficiency, improving book-to-bill ratios, and managing risks from lower-margin Asian sales and EMEA weakness.

feed.title: Supermicro (NASDAQ: SMCI) distributor Azio AI backs Philippines sovereign AI infrastructure talks
feed.summary: Azio AI, a Supermicro distributor, is engaged in early-stage talks with the Philippines to support the modernization of its Maharlika Investment Fund and corporation. This involves evaluating GPU-based AI data centers and sovereign compute architectures as part of the country's 2024–2025 planning cycle. The initiative aligns with Azio AI's strategy to expand into sovereign and public-sector AI infrastructure, although any commercial engagement is subject to definitive agreements.

feed.title: Lululemon’s Chief Executive Calvin McDonald to Depart Next Month
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica's CEO, Calvin McDonald, is set to step down in January and will also leave his board seat, though he will remain a senior adviser through March for a smooth transition. This departure comes amidst pressure from Lululemon's founder, Chip Wilson, who has reportedly been preparing for a proxy fight to instigate changes following a significant drop in the company's stock value this year.

feed.title: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces Fourth Quarter Dividend and Special Dividend on Common Stock
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the nation’s largest lodging real estate investment trust, announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share. Additionally, the company declared a special dividend of $0.15 per share, resulting in total declared dividends for the year of $0.95 per share. These dividends are payable on January 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of December 31, 2025.

feed.title: Host Hotels (HST) Declares Special Dividend Amid Strong Performa
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) has declared a special dividend of $0.15 per share, payable on January 15, 2026, while maintaining its quarterly dividend at $0.20 per share. Despite strong financial performance and high institutional ownership, the company faces potential liquidity constraints and a "Hold" rating from Evercore ISI, indicating a cautious market sentiment. The real estate investment trust operates predominantly urban and resort upscale hotels and has strategically focused its portfolio under Marriott and Starwood brands.

feed.title: Insider Sale: SVP|Co-Head of Global Business of $EPAM Sells 5,000 Shares
feed.summary: Boris Shnayder, SVP/Co-Head of Global Business at EPAM, sold 5,000 shares of EPAM stock for an estimated $1,035,000. This sale represents approximately 24.2% of his holdings in this class of stock. The article also details other insider trading activity, hedge fund movements, revenue figures, congressional stock trading, and analyst ratings for EPAM.

feed.title: TTEC Recognized as a Major Contender in Everest Group’s 2025 Sales Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment
feed.summary: TTEC Holdings, Inc. has been recognized as a Major Contender in the Everest Group Sales Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025. This marks the first time TTEC's RevGen capabilities have been evaluated in this report, acknowledging its comprehensive sales services portfolio and AI-driven solutions. The recognition highlights TTEC's strong capabilities in both B2B and B2C sales services, global delivery model, multi-industry expertise, and ability to drive measurable revenue outcomes for clients.

feed.title: Matillion recognized as a Challenger by the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™
feed.summary: Intelligent data integration platform Matillion has been named a Challenger in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data Integration Tools for the third consecutive year. The company's CEO, Matthew Scullion, highlights their commitment to redefining data integration through agentic AI, specifically with the introduction of Maia. Matillion aims to empower organizations to maximize data value and solve analytical and AI business needs efficiently.

feed.title: Chipotle Speaks Out After Woman Claims She ‘Bit into a Rodent’ in Burrito Bowl: 'We Will Vigorously Defend Ourselves'
feed.summary: A New York City woman is suing Chipotle Mexican Grill and DoorDash, alleging she bit into a rodent in her burrito bowl. While Chipotle strongly denies the claims, stating the object was a chicken tendon/ligament and plans to "vigorously defend" itself, the lawsuit seeks damages for alleged severe injuries and emotional distress. The plaintiff's attorneys emphasize holding all parties accountable for what they describe as "extreme and outrageous conduct."

feed.title: Blackstone buys portfolio of Texas retail properties for $440M - report (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone (BX) is reportedly acquiring a portfolio of Texas-based retail properties for $440 million. The portfolio encompasses approximately 2 million square feet across Dallas, Houston, and San Antonio. The deal was cited by Bloomberg, referencing an anonymous source familiar with the transaction.

feed.title: Bank of America promotes 394 to managing directors, up 2%, source says By Reuters
feed.summary: Bank of America has promoted 394 executives to managing director positions, an increase of 2% from the previous year, effective January 1. This includes 44 promotions in investment banking, 48 in global markets, and nine in research. This move follows CEO Brian Moynihan's plan to boost profitability, which includes technology investments and an expansion strategy.

feed.title: Align Technology (ALGN): Revisiting Valuation After Thailand Launch of New Invisalign Mandibular Advancement System
feed.summary: Align Technology (ALGN) has launched its Invisalign System with mandibular advancement and occlusal blocks in Thailand, contributing to recent stock momentum with 30-day and 90-day share price gains. Despite these recent gains, the stock remains down over one and five years. The company is considered 10.6% undervalued with a fair value near $184 due to expanding clinical indications and growing adoption, though its P/E ratio is higher than industry averages, suggesting the market is already pricing in some growth.

feed.title: Fed Approves PNC Financial Services Application
feed.summary: The Federal Reserve Board has approved The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc.'s application to acquire FirstBank Holding Company and, indirectly, FirstBank, both based in Colorado. This acquisition will expand PNC's presence by incorporating FirstBank into its holdings.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Ceases Substantial Holding in Guzman y Gomez Ltd.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. and its affiliates are no longer substantial holders in Guzman y Gomez Ltd. This change affects Guzman y Gomez's shareholder structure due to various transactions, including securities on loan and collateral. An analyst currently rates Guzman y Gomez Ltd. (AU:GYG) stock as a Buy with a price target of A$32.30.

feed.title: Self-Storage Development and Zoning Activity: December 2025
feed.summary: This article details significant self-storage development and zoning activities across the globe in December 2025. It highlights new projects, approvals, conversions, and municipal issues in the self-storage sector, featuring updates from various companies and regions. Key developments include new facility openings, planned constructions, and property conversions, underscoring the dynamic nature of the self-storage market.

feed.title: Aardvark Therapeutics stock rises 13% on positive trial updates, BTIG maintains Buy
feed.summary: Aardvark Therapeutics (NASDAQ:AARD) saw its stock increase by approximately 13% after announcing positive developments in its clinical programs, including the first patient dosed in the Phase 3 HERO trial in Australia and a high enrollment rate in its open-label extension study. BTIG analyst Jeet Mukherjee maintained a Buy rating and a $26.00 price target, citing promising safety and efficacy signals. The company maintains financial flexibility with more cash than debt, and topline data for the trial is anticipated in Q3 2026.
